composition_bias.interpretation: Top 3 projects account for 78.4% of all growth. This is a HEAVY-HITTER EFFECT — the ranking reflects popularity, not genuine trends.

formula.description: Composite trending score that balances relative growth (percentage), absolute growth (log of delta), project size (smaller = higher), and velocity (downloads per hour).
